blockers.description: Vercel build failing due to pre-existing unused imports in HomePage.tsx and GaragePage.tsx (TS6133 errors). Not caused by today's work.
blockers.workaround: Fix unused imports in those two files before next push, or they'll keep blocking Vercel deployment.

human_actions_pending.action: Delete duplicate Datsun — SQL: DELETE FROM vehicle_makes WHERE id = 2863
human_actions_pending.context: Two Datsun rows: id 36758 (keep) and id 2863 (NHTSA duplicate, delete).

human_actions_pending.action: Run Estima SQL if not done
human_actions_pending.context: INSERT INTO public.vehicle_models (make_id, model_name, year_start, year_end, is_jdm_only, body_style, source) SELECT id, 'Estima', 1990, 2019, true, 'minivan', 'jdm_manual' FROM public.vehicle_makes WHERE make_name ILIKE 'Toyota' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

human_actions_pending.action: DB cleanup — remove Honda motorcycles, consolidate Silvia/Skyline
human_actions_pending.context: Honda models include motorcycles (CBR, CRF, etc.). Silvia S13/S14/S15 → Silvia; Skyline R32/R33/R34 → Skyline.

decisions.decision: Snapshot redesigned as practical handoff card, not full spec sheet
decisions.rationale: A shop doesn't need HP/torque — they have a scanner. Snapshot = show mechanic/spouse/dealer. Build Sheet (future, /tuning/build-sheet) = enthusiast specs.

decisions.decision: Snapshot sections: Vehicle (VIN/plate/engine/tires/oil/battery/mileage), Service, Important Dates (registration + insurance renewal), Contacts
decisions.rationale: Matches user's mockup exactly. Important Dates split from Service as its own section.

decisions.decision: HP, torque, drivetrain, transmission, chassis code removed from Snapshot
decisions.rationale: These belong in Build Sheet when that phase comes.

decisions.decision: Details overlay in My Cars expanded with Vehicle Specs section
decisions.rationale: User chose this over a separate edit screen. Specs (engine, induction, HP, torque, transmission, drivetrain, chassis code, VIN, plate, oil, tires, battery) all editable from My Cars → Details.

decisions.decision: Choose button → saves gdim_chosen_car_id to localStorage → navigate to /garage
decisions.rationale: Choose sets active car for Snapshot. No longer jumps to Snapshot directly.

decisions.decision: Snapshot hero: photo box left (150×110, background-image to avoid Tailwind Preflight height:auto override), car name right (Hanken Grotesk bold italic -0.1em)
decisions.rationale: Used background-image on div instead of to bypass Tailwind Preflight img reset that caused height to override.

decisions.decision: Snapshot palette: light grey #e8e8e6 bg, dark #1a1a1c text
decisions.rationale: Contrast to dark GT aesthetic of rest of app. Readable for anyone, not just enthusiasts.

decisions.decision: CarReflection FL constants: FL_FX=0.13 FL_FY=1.1 FL_RX=0.93 FL_RY=0.82 FL_DEPTH=0.28
decisions.rationale: FL_FY>1.0 intentional — extends floor contact below image for front tire perspective.

decisions.decision: Stats (HP, torque etc.) belong in Snapshot, not Details — REVISED: now in Build Sheet
decisions.rationale: Originally planned for Snapshot. After user discussion, moved to Build Sheet (tuning section).

next_action: Fix pre-existing Vercel build errors: remove unused imports from src/pages/HomePage.tsx (FONT_TITLE, SHADOW_ICON_FOCAL, SHADOW_ICON_STANDARD, SHADOW_GROUND, 'entered' var) and src/pages/GaragePage.tsx (GRADIENT_APP_BG, COLOR_CAVITY_BG, SPACE_MD). Then begin task 28: Tuning screen at /tuning.
context_notes: Dev server runs on port 5176 with --host flag (accessible on local network at 192.168.3.9:5176). App ~/Desktop/g-dimension. Supabase project: uxqoernfrtgclpneirvc. All committed clean (9fe33b5). Snapshot is a practical handoff card — show your mechanic, spouse, or dealer. Service/Contacts stubs will fill automatically when Reminders and Contacts screens are built. photo_y_offset column (0-100, default 50) controls vertical crop position for car photos. gdim_chosen_car_id in localStorage selects which car shows in Snapshot; falls back to first car if not set.
